Class ScreenController

java.lang.Object
com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.ScreenController
public class ScreenController extends Object
Class that manages and handles the loading of all screens
Version:
2.0 April 6 2025
Author:
Neil Daya, Meer Ali

      public void addScreen(String screenName, javafx.scene.layout.Pane screen, javafx.fxml.FXMLLoader loader)

      screen - screen object
      loader - loader object
